title: lepidium draba subsp. eudraba
intro: Lepidium draba subsp. eudraba, also known as white mustard or wild mustard, is a plant species within the mustard family (Brassicaceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including allyl isothiocyanate, which has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lepidium draba subsp. eudraba include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, as well as its antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
